items.title: Jenna Ortega’s $137M Entry in Iconic Horror Franchise To Stream on Netflix
items.summary: The 2022 sequel to an iconic horror franchise starring Jenna Ortega is coming to Netflix soon. The film introduces new characters and takes place more than two decades after the events of the original film, bringing back some of the cast who helped make the franchise a cultural phenomenon.
